message:
test(fcp-core): refresh enrollment and simulate request CBOR vectors

Regenerated `crates/fcp-core/tests/vectors/enrollment/request_vectors.cbor`
and `crates/fcp-core/tests/vectors/simulate/simulate_request_vectors.cbor`
so the on-disk golden vectors line up with the current serialization
shape of the enrollment and simulate request types.

These files are the frozen inputs used by the vector-driven conformance
tests under `crates/fcp-core`; when the request type picks up new
fields or tightens existing field encodings, the committed `.cbor`
blobs need to be re-written or the golden tests will report a spurious
drift.

Scope is deliberately minimal: two-byte header-range deltas in each
file (schema version / length prefix), no change to the wire
format of already-stable fields, and no corresponding source-code
edits in this commit — the matching type changes rode in with earlier
commits on main. This commit just moves the golden artifacts forward.
